title: Voyage Rerank: high-precision rerank API review | reranker.uk
description: Voyage Rerank review: voyage-rerank-2 and domain-specific variants (code, finance). Benchmarks, pricing, Python usage, pros and cons for adding high-quality reranking to RAG.
og_description: Voyage AI's rerankers are optimised for retrieval precision with domain-specific variants for code and finance.
